Class Expense

java.lang.Object
domain.Expense
public class Expense extends Object
Represents a single expense transaction logged by the user. Each expense belongs to a BudgetCycle and a Category.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private double
    amount
    Monetary amount of the expense in EGP.
    private int
    categoryId
    ID of the Category this expense belongs to.
    private int
    cycleId
    ID of the BudgetCycle this expense is recorded under.
    private int
    id
    Unique database identifier for this expense.
    private LocalDateTime
    timestamp
    Date and time when this expense was created.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Expense(double amount, int categoryId, int cycleId)
    Constructs a new Expense and stamps it with the current date and time.

    Returns the monetary amount of this expense.

    Returns the timestamp when this expense was recorded.

    Updates the monetary amount of this expense.
    void

    Updates the category associated with this expense.

    Sets the database ID for this expense (called after DB insert).

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id
      Unique database identifier for this expense.

    • amount

      private double amount
      Monetary amount of the expense in EGP.

    • categoryId

      private int categoryId
      ID of the Category this expense belongs to.

    • cycleId

      private int cycleId
      ID of the BudgetCycle this expense is recorded under.

    • timestamp

      private LocalDateTime timestamp
      Date and time when this expense was created.

  • Constructor Details

    • Expense

      public Expense(double amount, int categoryId, int cycleId)
      Constructs a new Expense and stamps it with the current date and time.
      Parameters:
      amount - monetary value in EGP (must be > 0)
      categoryId - ID of the associated category
      cycleId - ID of the active budget cycle

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique ID of this expense.
      Returns:
      expense ID

    • getAmount

      public double getAmount()
      Returns the monetary amount of this expense.
      Returns:
      amount in EGP

    • getCategoryId

      public int getCategoryId()
      Returns the category ID associated with this expense.
      Returns:
      category ID

    • getCycleId

      public int getCycleId()
      Returns the budget cycle ID this expense belongs to.
      Returns:
      cycle ID

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Returns the timestamp when this expense was recorded.
      Returns:
      creation date and time

    • setAmount

      public void setAmount(double amount)
      Updates the monetary amount of this expense.
      Parameters:
      amount - new amount in EGP (must be > 0)

    • setCategoryId

      public void setCategoryId(int categoryId)
      Updates the category associated with this expense.
      Parameters:
      categoryId - new category ID

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the database ID for this expense (called after DB insert).
      Parameters:
      id - generated database ID
